name: neuralradialmenu
title: Neural Radial Menu
description: A "God-Tier" Radial Menu inspired by the "Magic Indicator" concept. Features: - Exponential radial expansion. - Synaptic Indicator: A glowing active state that flows between items. - 3D icon transforms and spring physics.
